claim: Agent skills bundle instructions, scripts, templates, and other assets together; they are loaded on-demand (token-efficient) rather than in the system prompt
actionable: Package reusable agent workflows as skills with supporting scripts and examples; load them on-demand via skill descriptor
source_title: A better way to build agents? Claude Agent Skills Tutorial + Demo

claim: Agent skills can include sub-instructions, Python scripts, templates, fonts, and examples; multiple skills can coexist alongside MCP servers in a working context
actionable: Build skills that include script execution, conditional branching, and asset references; use skills + MCPs together for flexible agent capabilities
source_title: A better way to build agents? Claude Agent Skills Tutorial + Demo

claim: Agent skills can be uploaded via Claude chat or called directly via Claude API; skills are addressable both in UI and programmatically
actionable: Build skills as reusable components; invoke them via chat or API depending on your deployment pattern
source_title: A better way to build agents? Claude Agent Skills Tutorial + Demo

claim: Agent skills excel at handling variability in business processes (e.g., contract templating with different clauses per client); they package logic, templates, and examples together
actionable: Use skills to handle variable business processes; encode conditional logic, templates, and examples in the skill definition
source_title: A better way to build agents? Claude Agent Skills Tutorial + Demo
